name: Grand Solar Flash RPG-FR
description:
Free Roam Version 

In the year 2025, the world was forever changed by a celestial event that would come to be known as the Grand Solar Flash. As the planets aligned, Earth was bombarded by a great wave of energized particles from the center of the universe, tearing open dimensional barriers and allowing long-lost mythical creatures, fantasy races, and the magic of old to return to the world once more.

But the event didn't only affect the world outside. It also left an indelible mark on the human genome, bringing forth dormant psychic powers and the ability to wield magic. The line between what was once considered technology and magic began to blur, paving the way for a new era of possibilities.

With each passing year, it became apparent that a significant shift was occurring within society. Female births started to outnumber male births, and women, emboldened by their newfound powers, grew more assertive and sexually aggressive. It wasn't just a shift in numbers, it was a seismic shift of power. For every one man, there were now ten women, and female psychic and magical abilities far surpassed those of their male counterparts.

As society adjusted to this new reality, the concept of a matriarchy began to take shape. Women rose to positions of leadership, their voices carrying more weight than ever before. The world that once favored men now bowed to the might of the feminine. It was a time of profound transformation.

SPECIAL NOTE: This is the free roam version that is not restricted by storyline (unlike the original).
creator: randalReps
